name: Hexa War Idle Battle
author: Poki
description: Hexa War Idle Battle is a war game where the Blue team faces off against the Red in a fight for domination! As commander of the Blue army, your mission is to chop trees, craft tiles, and pave the way to the enemy’s base. Build up your camp, summon powerful soldiers, and launch your attack to crush the Red army once and for all. Can you outsmart and outbuild your rivals to claim victory? How to play Hexa War Idle Battle? Click or tap to make the choice. Use WASD, arrow keys or the joystick to move. Who created Hexa War Idle Battle? Hexa War Idle Battle is created by Square Dino. Play their other games on Poki: Cats vs Zombies ! How can I play Hexa War Idle Battle for free? You can play Hexa War Idle Battle for free on Poki. Can I play Hexa War Idle Battle on mobile devices and desktop? Hexa War Idle Battle can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
